title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 22 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 22 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 22 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 22/03/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 2.15% today, the main contract closed at 865.5.The traders' willingness to ship is more. The steel mills aremore active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is general.PBF at Shandong port deal 880-892 yuan/mt, decrease 1-13 yuan/ mt.PBF at Tangshan port deal 895 yuan/mt,decrease 20 yuan/mt. From the perspective of the news, overseas economic events continue to affect domestic market sentiment, and the iron ore futures market conƟnues to weaken.
